theorem associator_op : ∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (x y z : Rᵐᵒᵖ), associator x y z = -MulOpposite.op (associator (MulOpposite.unop z) (MulOpposite.unop y) (MulOpposite.unop x)) := by
  intro R _ x y z
  apply MulOpposite.unop_injective
  change MulOpposite.unop z * (MulOpposite.unop y * MulOpposite.unop x) - (MulOpposite.unop z * MulOpposite.unop y) * MulOpposite.unop x = - (((MulOpposite.unop z * MulOpposite.unop y) * MulOpposite.unop x) - MulOpposite.unop z * (MulOpposite.unop y * MulOpposite.unop x))
  rw [neg_sub]
